ddls:
CREATE TABLE "memory_card_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory card format */,
  "magic_string" TEXT /* Magic string that identifies the card format */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the format */,
  "page_size" INTEGER /* Size in bytes of a memory card page */,
  "pages_per_cluster" INTEGER /* Number of pages in a cluster */,
  "pages_per_block" INTEGER /* Number of pages in an erase block */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the format */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Information about backward compatibility */,
  "error_handling" TEXT /* Description of error handling mechanisms */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the format was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bad_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bad block */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory card format */,
  "page_start" INTEGER /* Starting page of the bad block */,
  "page_end" INTEGER /* Ending page of the bad block */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bad block issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the bad block issue */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date when the bad block was detected */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* Date when the bad block was last tested */,
  "is_fixed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the bad block has been fixed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bad_blocks_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES memory_card_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_card_pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory card format */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cluster containing the page */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block containing the page */,
  "data" TEXT /* Binary data stored in the page */,
  "is_bad" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the page is bad */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* The page number within the block */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum value for data integrity verification */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date when the page was last accessed */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the page has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_card_pages_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_card_pages_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES memory_card_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_card_pages_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory card format */,
  "first_page" INTEGER /* First page of the cluster */,
  "last_page" INTEGER /* Last page of the cluster */,
  "cluster_number" INTEGER /* The cluster number within the memory card */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cluster */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was last tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES memory_card_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory card format */,
  "first_page" INTEGER /* First page of the block */,
  "last_page" INTEGER /* Last page of the block */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* The block number within the memory card */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the block */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* Date when the block was last tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES memory_card_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_card_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory card image */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory card format */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the memory card image in bytes */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the memory card image was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date the memory card image was last modified */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory card image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory card image */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the image */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was last tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_card_images_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES memory_card_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_pages" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory card image */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the page within the image */,
  "page_number_in_image" INTEGER /* The page number within the image */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date when the page was last accessed in the image */,
  "access_count_in_image" INTEGER /* Number of times the page has been accessed in the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id", "page_id")
)
